greetings.cold: The Archive closes at five, Mr. Gibbons. It is currently open to those with citations.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons. Sign the ledger; the Archive keeps better records of its visitors than the visitors do.
greetings.warm: Ah, the careful one. Come in — I've set aside something with a marvelous provenance.

etiquette.note: Answers better if you sign the visitor ledger first (she checks — it's an archive). Lecture-mode melts into girlish excitement about dead people's love lives.
